title: × heropaludorchis genevensis
intro: × Heropaludorchis genevensis is a hybrid orchid plant, resulting from the cross between Herorchis paludosa and Orchis mascula. Unfortunately, I could not verify the medicinal properties of this plant, but it is likely that it shares some characteristics with its parent species. As a result, it may possess similar health benefits, such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, due to its flavonoid and phenolic content. However, the specific herbal preparations and potential uses of × Heropaludorchis genevensis are not well-documented.
